svg.title: Hold'em capability over time
svg.desc: Best-so-far avg_utility_model in fixed-limit chips per hand against the tight-turn-river-exact-pot-odds e8 gate, using real git commit timestamps. g.text: failed robustness probes stay in the table, not the capability line
